assignments.name: =plan
start_date
assignments.value: ={{ new Date($json.fields["Start Date"] + "T00:00:00").toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { day: '2-digit', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' }).replace(/ /g, '-') }}

assignments.name: end_date
assignments.value: ={{ new Date($json.fields["End Date"] + "T00:00:00").toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { day: '2-digit', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' }).replace(/ /g, '-') }}

parameters.subject: Welcome to SareX Gym – Your Membership is Active 💪
parameters.message:
=
BUILT FOR STRENGTH

Hello {{ $json.first_name }},

Welcome to SareX Gym. Your membership has been successfully activated.

You are now part of a high-performance environment built for strength, discipline, and real results.

MEMBERSHIP PLAN
{{ $json.plan }}

START DATE
{{ $json.start_date }}

END DATE

Stay consistent. Stay powerful.

assignments.name: end_date
assignments.value: ={{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.submission.questions[7].value.includes('Weekly') ? DateTime.fromISO($('Webhook').item.json.body.submission.submissionTime).plus({ weeks: 1 }).toFormat('dd MMMM yyyy') : $('Webhook').item.json.body.submission.questions[7].value.includes('1 Months') ? DateTime.fromISO($('Webhook').item.json.body.submission.submissionTime).plus({ months: 1 }).toFormat('dd MMMM yyyy') : $('Webhook').item.json.body.submission.questions[7].value.includes('3 Months') ? DateTime.fromISO($('Webhook').item.json.body.submission.submissionTime).plus({ months: 3 }).toFormat('dd MMMM yyyy') : DateTime.fromISO($('Webhook').item.json.body.submission.submissionTime).plus({ months: 6 }).toFormat('dd MMMM yyyy') }}
